Name: Haritha Vemuri
Feedback: I had the wonderful opportunity to be a part of the Amazon ML Summer School cohort conducted by Girls Leading Tech. The sessions were insightful and well-structured, providing both theoretical foundations and practical applications of machine learning. Learning directly from experts gave me clarity on real-world use cases and motivated me to explore this field more deeply. I’m truly grateful to Girls Leading Tech for creating such an empowering and impactful learning experience

Name: GOLLA VENKATA NAGA SRI MANJUSHA
Feedback:
Being part of the Girls Leading Tech ML Cohort was a truly transformative experience. Over the span of four weeks, I wasn’t just learning machine learning — I was living it.

The structure itself was beautifully challenging. The first three weeks were filled with continuous assignments and projects, each one pushing me to think more critically, solve problems creatively, and apply ML concepts in practical ways. There was no pause button — just a steady rhythm of growth, week after week. And then came the highlight: the Global AI Build-a-thon in week four. It felt less like a competition and more like a celebration of ideas, where collaboration and innovation came alive on a global stage.

What made the journey even more enriching was the mentorship. Having professionals, including those from Amazon, share their insights was invaluable. Their guidance, combined with interactive YouTube live sessions and LinkedIn engagements, created an environment where learning felt dynamic, connected, and inspiring.

But beyond the technical skills, what I truly gained was community. A community of like-minded individuals driven by curiosity, resilience, and the courage to innovate. That spirit of togetherness and support is something I’ll always cherish.

When Girls Leading Tech invited me to join as an alumna, I felt honored. Because this cohort wasn’t just about completing projects — it was about carrying forward a mindset: to keep building, to keep learning, and to keep inspiring.

Name: GELLI VEENKATA NAVYASRI SARVANI
Feedback:
Being part of the Amazon ML Summer School has been one of the most transformative experiences in my learning journey.

When I first joined the cohort, I was excited but also a little nervous. Machine learning can feel vast and complex, but the way this program was structured made it not just approachable, but truly exciting to learn.

Every session felt like a deep dive into the real-world side of ML. From understanding foundational concepts to exploring ensemble methods like Random Forest , hyperparameter tuning, and even model explainability each week pushed me to go beyond theory and think like an ML engineer.

The mentors were incredible.
What I loved the most was how everything was hands-on. The quizzes, mock tests, and especially the projects — they really made me apply what I learned. And every time I submitted something, I learned a little more
The cohort also gave me a sense of community. Seeing so many passionate learners, the energy in the Discord discussions, and the support from the organizing team — it made this feel like more than just a course.

Name: Isha
Feedback:
Participating in the Amazon ML Cohort was an amazing experience for me. I learned a lot about Machine Learning, from foundational concepts to practical applications. The program provided structured guidance, hands-on projects, and opportunities to apply what I learned in real-world scenarios.

Through the cohort, I not only improved my understanding of ML algorithms but also worked on projects that helped me practice implementing models, preprocessing data, and evaluating results. It gave me confidence to explore more advanced topics and strengthened my interest in AI and ML.

Overall, it was a highly valuable and enriching experience that boosted both my skills and enthusiasm for the field.

Name: Prapti Ashok Devadhe
Feedback:
I came to know about the Girls Leading Tech Amazon ML Summer School cohort through LinkedIn, and honestly, it has been such a wonderful journey. This program gave me so much learning and growth. It really helped me clear my basics in Machine Learning and I also got the chance to build several projects.

The live sessions were super engaging, and the regular test series really helped me stay consistent. I also loved how they gave a spotlight to good performers and the top 5 projects every week. That made it competitive but also very motivating.

I was really happy when my project was selected in the Week 2 Spotlight—that was such a proud moment for me.
I’m truly grateful to Amazon ML Summer School and Girls Leading Tech for this amazing opportunity. Thank you so much for creating such an impactful learning platform. I’m really happy to be part of this cohort and I look forward to more such opportunities in the future.

Name: Ayushi Vats
Feedback: Being a part of the Amazon ML Summer School cohort was an enriching experience where I gained hands-on exposure to core machine learning concepts and real-world problem solving. The sessions by industry experts not only strengthened my fundamentals but also gave me practical insights into applications of ML at scale.

Name: Renu Kumari Prajapati
Feedback:
Hi, I’m Renu Kumari Prajapati, currently pursuing a B.Tech in Information Technology.

I got to know about the ML Cohort because I’m a member of Girls Leading Tech. Being part of this community has been such a blessing—it’s a safe and supportive space where I feel relatable, I’ve learned a lot, and I’m still growing every day.

Because of my college schedule, I could attend only Week 1 coding and MCQ sessions live, and also attended some live classes and doubt classes, but later I watched all the class recordings and studied the materials. Everything was super valuable and easy to follow. I even submitted all my projects from Week 1 to Week 3 and participated in the Global AI Buildathon and submitted my project. Honestly, if I had more time, I’m sure I could have been on the leaderboard every week!

Overall, my experience was wonderful. The cohort really helped me build my foundation in machine learning, gave me practical exposure, and boosted my confidence to apply what I learned.

I would highly recommend anyone interested in AI or tech to join Girls Leading Tech and their initiatives. It’s not just about learning—it’s about community, growth, and supporting meaningful causes.

Thank you for this amazing opportunity. 💙
